# Beebeeb

> End-to-end encrypted, zero-knowledge cloud storage. Made in Europe by Initlabs B.V.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://beebeeb.io): Product overview — encrypted storage with apps for every platform
- [Security](https://beebeeb.io/security): How zero-knowledge encryption works — AES-256-GCM, Argon2id, key derivation flow
- [Pricing](https://beebeeb.io/pricing): Free (5 GB), Basic (EUR 10.99/mo, 1 TB), Pro (EUR 54.95/mo, 5 TB+), Business (EUR 109.90/mo, 10 TB+, coming later)
- [Support](https://beebeeb.io/support): FAQ, contact form, system status
- [Blog](https://beebeeb.io/blog): Engineering and privacy articles from the team
- [Features](https://beebeeb.io/features): Full feature list with platform availability

## Comparisons

- [vs iCloud](https://beebeeb.io/vs/icloud): Feature-by-feature comparison with Apple iCloud
- [vs Proton Drive](https://beebeeb.io/vs/proton-drive): Comparison with Proton Drive
- [vs Tresorit](https://beebeeb.io/vs/tresorit): Comparison with Tresorit

## Optional

- [About](https://beebeeb.io/about): Company story, founders, five promises
- [Status](https://beebeeb.io/status): Real-time service uptime and incident history
- [Open source](https://github.com/beebeeb-io): GitHub repositories — core, cli, web, mobile, desktop
- [Bug bounty](https://beebeeb.io/bug-bounty): Responsible disclosure program and reward tiers
